summary: Portfolio status degraded from stable yellow to concerning yellow with soft-power development stalling completely after strong momentum. Chief-scout test failures persist as critical blockers, while neutralworking deployment remains broken, preventing portfolio visibility.

soft-power.one_liner: Development stalled completely with zero commits this week after strong momentum, urgently needs CI/CD

director.one_liner: Remains completely stalled with zero activity for 30+ days, ready for archival

chief-scout.one_liner: High activity continues but critical test failures still block core functionality

kb.one_liner: Minimal but steady activity with reliable deployments and no blocking issues

wellness-session.one_liner: Strong momentum with 3 commits and working deployments, addressing feature improvements

language-tidbits.one_liner: Peak velocity maintained at 29 commits, still needs CI/CD infrastructure urgently

brain-levelup.one_liner: Steady acceleration with 4 commits, needs deployment monitoring setup

crumble.one_liner: Extended inactivity continues despite working CI/CD, appears abandoned

neutralworking.one_liner: Consistent development but deployment failure persists, blocking portfolio visibility

head-of-product.one_liner: Strong momentum with 11 commits, high-severity TODOs require immediate attention

cross_project_ranking.action: Investigate cause of development stall and restore momentum, implement CI/CD pipeline
cross_project_ranking.reason: Highest priority visual novel completely stalled after strong momentum - critical regression in key revenue project

cross_project_ranking.action: Fix critical test failures (test_red_card, test_injury_sub, test_extra_time) and repair failing workflows
cross_project_ranking.reason: High-priority development tool with broken core functionality blocking team productivity despite active development

cross_project_ranking.action: Fix 'deploy to coolify' workflow failure to restore portfolio site functionality
cross_project_ranking.reason: Portfolio site deployment failures prevent project visibility and professional presence

cross_project_ranking.action: Resolve high-severity TODOs in lib/github_client.py and prompts/repo_analyst.md
cross_project_ranking.reason: Critical orchestration tool TODOs blocking workflow improvements and portfolio management efficiency

cross_project_ranking.action: Set up CI/CD pipeline to support exceptional development velocity safely
cross_project_ranking.reason: Engine at peak velocity needs deployment infrastructure to prevent regression introduction

needs_decision.question: Should this completely stalled game project be formally archived?
needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as cancelled - zero activity for 30+ days indicates project abandonment

needs_decision.question: Should this dormant web-app be archived given extended inactivity?
needs_decision.recommendation: Archive as completed - extended inactivity with working CI/CD suggests natural project completion
